name: notion_append_block_children
description: Append new children blocks to a specified parent block in Notion. Requires insert content capabilities.

block_id.description: The ID of the parent block. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

children.description: Array of block objects to append. Each block must follow the Notion block schema.

after.description: The ID of the existing block to append after.

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

block_id.description: The ID of the block to retrieve. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

name: notion_retrieve_block_children
description: Retrieve the children of a block

block_id.description: The ID of the block. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

start_cursor.description: Pagination cursor for next page of results

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

block_id.description: The ID of the block to delete. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

name: notion_update_block
description: Update the content of a block in Notion based on its type. The update replaces the entire value for a given field.

block_id.description: The ID of the block to update. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

block.description: The updated content for the block. Must match the block type schema.

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

page_id.description: The ID of the page to retrieve. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

name: notion_update_page_properties
description: Update properties of a page or an item in a Notion database

page_id.description: The ID of the page or database item to update. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

properties.description: Properties to update. These correspond to the columns or fields in the database.

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

name: notion_list_all_users
description: List all users in the Notion workspace. Note: Requires Notion Enterprise plan and Organization API key.

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

name: notion_retrieve_user
description: Retrieve a specific user by user_id in Notion. Note: Requires Notion Enterprise plan and Organization API key.

user_id.description: The ID of the user to retrieve. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

name: notion_retrieve_bot_user
description: Retrieve the bot user associated with the current token in Notion

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

parent_page_id.description: The ID of the parent page. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

title.description: Title of the database as rich text array.

properties.description: Property schema for the database columns.

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

database_id.description: The ID of the database to query. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

database_id.description: The ID of the database to retrieve. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

database_id.description: The ID of the database to update. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

title.description: New title as rich text array.

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

name: notion_create_database_item
description: Create a new item (page) in a Notion database

database_id.description: The ID of the database. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

properties.description: Properties for the new item matching the database schema.

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

name: notion_create_comment
description: Create a comment in Notion. This requires the integration to have insert comment capabilities.

parent_id.description: The ID of the page or block to add the comment to. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

discussion_id.description: ID of an existing discussion thread to add to.

rich_text.description: Comment content as rich text array.

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

name: notion_retrieve_comments
description: Retrieve a list of unresolved comments from a Notion page or block. Requires the integration to have read comment capabilities.

block_id.description: The ID of the page or block. It should be a 32-character string (excluding hyphens) formatted as 8-4-4-4-12 with hyphens (-).

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.

name: notion_search
description: Search pages or databases by title in Notion

query.description: Text to search for in page and database titles.

filter_value.description: Filter by type: page or database.

format.description: Specify the response format. 'json' returns the original data structure, 'markdown' returns a more readable format. Use 'markdown' when the user only needs to read the page, 'json' when they need to write or modify it.
